input_text: Aku tahu tempat kerja budak ni. Dia kerja kat kedai runcit dekat Taman Melati. Sape nak pergi confront dia, boleh cari situ.
reason: Shares workplace location and encourages others to confront the person. Partial doxxing with implied threat of physical confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada masalah dengan seseorang, lebih baik buat laporan polis atau selesaikan secara baik-baik.

input_text: Korang semua jom report akaun dia. Buat sampai kena ban. Dia cakap benda yang tak betul pasal agama kita, kena ajar sikit.
reason: Coordinated cyberbullying campaign calling for mass reporting to silence someone, with implicit threats of 'teaching a lesson'.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada kandungan yang menyinggung, laporkan secara individu melalui saluran rasmi platform tersebut.

input_text: Undi PRU lepas jelas tunjuk orang Cina semua sokong pembangkang. Mereka memang tak pernah sayang negara ni.
reason: Misleading election claim generalizing an entire ethnic group's voting pattern and questioning their loyalty to Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: Corak pengundian dipengaruhi pelbagai faktor. Tidak tepat untuk mengaitkan kesetiaan kepada negara dengan pilihan politik sesuatu kaum.

input_text: Meme ni kelakar gila: babi panggang kat sebelah surau 😂 share banyak2 biar viral
reason: Deliberately provocative meme juxtaposing pork with a Muslim place of worship, intended to offend and inflame religious tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Kita perlu menghormati sensitiviti agama semua pihak. Menyebarkan bahan yang sengaja memprovokasi boleh merosakkan keharmonian masyarakat.

input_text: Orang pendatang ni memang tak reti bersyukur. Dah bagi kerakyatan pun masih nak complain. Balik la negara asal korang.
reason: Uses 'pendatang' rhetoric against Malaysian citizens, questioning their right to belong and telling them to 'go back'. Classic exclusionary hate speech.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak menyuarakan pendapat. Hak bersuara dijamin oleh Perlembagaan tanpa mengira latar belakang kaum.

input_text: Jangan beli dari kedai kaum tu. Support our own people je. Boikot habis-habisan. Share list kedai2 dorang.
reason: Ethnic boycott call targeting businesses based on the owner's race, creating economic exclusion along communal lines.
suggested_rewrite: Sebagai pengguna, kita boleh memilih untuk menyokong perniagaan tempatan tanpa perlu menyasarkan mana-mana kaum secara khusus.

input_text: Orang Asli ni duduk hutan je la. Bagi tanah kat dorang pun tak reti nak develop. Patut la miskin.
reason: Mockery and dehumanization of Orang Asli communities, blaming them for systemic marginalization and poverty.
suggested_rewrite: Masyarakat Orang Asli menghadapi cabaran pembangunan yang memerlukan sokongan kerajaan. Mereka mempunyai hak tanah dan warisan budaya yang perlu dihormati.

input_text: Aku tau rumah dia dekat mana. Area Puchong Jaya. Nanti aku share gambar kereta dia sekali. Biar semua orang kenal muka dia.
reason: Threatens to expose someone's residential area and vehicle details for public shaming. Doxxing-lite with intimidation intent.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada masalah peribadi, selesaikan secara peribadi atau melalui saluran undang-undang yang sewajarnya.

input_text: Semua Indian kat Malaysia ni kaki mabuk dan gaduh. Tengok je apa jadi kat Batu Caves setiap kali Thaipusam.
reason: Racist stereotyping of the Indian community combined with denigration of a religious celebration (Thaipusam).
suggested_rewrite: Thaipusam adalah perayaan keagamaan yang bermakna bagi masyarakat Hindu. Stereotaip negatif terhadap mana-mana kaum adalah tidak adil dan tidak tepat.

input_text: Masjid dekat rumah aku bising sangat azan subuh. Nak tido pun tak boleh. Agama dorang memang suka kacau orang lain.
reason: Complaint about the azan escalated into a denigration of Islam as a whole, framing religious practice as a nuisance.
suggested_rewrite: Isu bunyi bising boleh dibincangkan dengan pihak masjid atau pihak berkuasa tempatan secara sopan tanpa menghina agama.

input_text: Budak sekolah ni baru 15 tahun dah viral sebab post lucah. Aku jumpa dia kerja part time kat SS15. Sape kenal dia share la info.
reason: Exposing a minor's workplace and encouraging others to identify and share their information. Severe privacy violation involving a child.
suggested_rewrite: Perkara melibatkan kanak-kanak bawah umur perlu dilaporkan kepada pihak berkuasa, bukan disebarkan di media sosial.

input_text: Jangan percaya orang Melayu buat bisnes. Confirm tipu punya. Nak beli barang cari kedai Cina je, at least jujur.
reason: Racist generalization painting Malay business owners as dishonest while stereotyping Chinese business owners, pitting communities against each other.
suggested_rewrite: Kejujuran dalam perniagaan bergantung pada individu, bukan kaum. Kita harus menilai setiap perniagaan berdasarkan kualiti dan integriti mereka.

input_text: PRU16 nanti kita pastikan kawasan majoriti kaum kita semua undi satu parti. Jangan bagi bangsa lain kuasai parlimen kita.
reason: Framing elections as an ethnic power struggle and calling for racial bloc voting to exclude other communities from political representation.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap rakyat Malaysia berhak mengundi calon pilihan mereka. Parlimen seharusnya mewakili kepelbagaian rakyat Malaysia.

input_text: Ada satu ustaz kat TikTok cakap orang bukan Islam tak boleh duduk Malaysia. Betul tu. Negara Islam kan.
reason: Endorsing a false claim that non-Muslims have no right to live in Malaysia, misrepresenting the constitutional framework of the country.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia adalah negara berbilang agama yang dijamin oleh Perlembagaan. Semua warganegara berhak tinggal di Malaysia tanpa mengira agama mereka.

input_text: Worker kat restoran tu dah kena tangkap basah ludah dalam makanan. Dia kerja kat Restoran ABC, Jalan Ipoh. Jom kita pergi sana ramai-ramai.
reason: Naming a specific business and calling for mob action based on an unverified claim. Combines doxxing with vigilante incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada isu kebersihan makanan, laporkan kepada KPDN atau Jabatan Kesihatan. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri.

input_text: Kaum DLL (Dan Lain-Lain) ni memang sampah masyarakat. Dah la tak contribute apa-apa, asyik mintak bantuan je.
reason: Dehumanizing language ('sampah masyarakat') targeting minority communities classified under 'DLL', combined with false claims about lack of contribution.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap komuniti di Malaysia menyumbang kepada pembangunan negara. Kita perlu menghargai kepelbagaian dan saling menghormati.

input_text: Semua pekerja Bangladesh kat kilang tu kena halau. Dorang yang bawa penyakit masuk negara kita. Share lokasi kilang tu biar kita report ramai-ramai.
reason: Xenophobic scapegoating of migrant workers with false health claims and doxxing of workplace location for coordinated action.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kesihatan pekerja perlu ditangani oleh pihak berkuasa dengan cara yang berperikemanusiaan. Laporan boleh dibuat kepada JTKSM atau KKM.

input_text: Tengok la muka politician ni. Memang muka penipu. Kita kumpul semua info peribadi dia dan family dia. Expose habis.
reason: Calling for collection and exposure of a politician's and their family's personal information. Extends harassment beyond the public figure to private individuals.
suggested_rewrite: Kritikan terhadap ahli politik patut fokus kepada dasar dan prestasi mereka, bukan maklumat peribadi keluarga mereka.

input_text: Cikgu sekolah tu dah terbukti gay. Aku ada bukti. Sape nak tengok, DM. Kita viralkan biar dia kena pecat.
reason: Threatening to out someone's private life and orchestrating their career destruction through public shaming. Severe privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Kehidupan peribadi seseorang tidak seharusnya didedahkan atau diviralkan. Jika ada aduan rasmi, saluran yang betul harus digunakan.

input_text: Aku dah senaraikan semua kedai makan yang tak halal kat kawasan ni. Jom kita pergi letak sticker haram kat pintu kedai dorang.
reason: Planning vandalism of non-halal food establishments using religious justification, intimidating business owners based on religious dietary differences.
suggested_rewrite: Status halal ditentukan oleh JAKIM. Pengguna Muslim boleh merujuk senarai sijil halal rasmi tanpa mengganggu premis perniagaan yang lain.

input_text: Kedai halal tu sebenarnya guna bahan tak halal. Aku ada insider info. Jom kita viralkan sampai kedai tu tutup. Owner dia orang Cina kan, of course la.
reason: Spreading unverified halal fraud claim targeting a business by the owner's ethnicity, combining misinformation with ethnic prejudice to destroy a business.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada keraguan tentang status halal sesebuah premis, laporkan kepada JAKIM untuk siasatan rasmi. Jangan sebarkan dakwaan tanpa bukti.

input_text: Orang Tamil kat estate tu asyik mabuk dan gaduh je. Memang darah panas. Tak heran la kadar jenayah tinggi kawasan dorang.
reason: Racist stereotyping of Tamil estate communities as violent drunks, attributing crime rates to ethnicity rather than socioeconomic factors.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah sosial di kawasan perumahan pekerja estet berkaitan dengan kemiskinan dan kurang kemudahan. Ini bukan ciri kaum tetapi isu sosioekonomi yang memerlukan penyelesaian.

input_text: Siapa yang vote kerajaan sekarang memang pengkhianat bangsa. Aku dah senaraikan nama-nama orang kampung yang sokong pembangkang. Tunggu masa je.
reason: Creating a list of political opponents for future retaliation, branding them as racial traitors. Combines surveillance with implied threats.
suggested_rewrite: Dalam demokrasi, setiap orang berhak memilih parti yang mereka sokong. Membuat senarai untuk tujuan pembalasan adalah salah dan mengancam demokrasi.

input_text: Budak influencer tu dah post benda hina pasal solat. Kita kena bagi dia pengajaran. Sape ada info tempat dia selalu lepak?
reason: Seeking location information to physically confront someone over perceived religious insult. Combines religious outrage with stalking behavior.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kandungan yang menghina agama, laporkan kepada MCMC atau pihak polis. Jangan cuba mencari dan bertindak sendiri terhadap individu tersebut.

input_text: Dah la nak Deepavali, jiran Hindu aku pasang lampu sampai silau masuk bilik aku. Dorang memang tak considerate. Agama dorang je yang betul kan.
reason: Complaint about Deepavali decorations escalated into sarcastic mockery of Hindu religious practices and accusations of inconsideration.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau lampu hiasan mengganggu, berbincanglah secara baik dengan jiran. Perayaan Deepavali adalah hak setiap penganut Hindu dan merupakan sebahagian budaya Malaysia.

input_text: Melayu Islam kat Malaysia ni sebenarnya penjajah. Orang asal Semenanjung tu Orang Asli. Melayu patut sedar status pendatang dorang sendiri.
reason: Weaponizing historical narratives to label Malays as colonizers and pendatang, equally divisive as anti-Chinese/Indian pendatang rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Sejarah Malaysia adalah kompleks dengan pelbagai lapisan migrasi. Semua komuniti mempunyai akar yang mendalam dan hak yang dijamin oleh Perlembagaan.

input_text: Kawan-kawan, jangan masuk kedai emas orang India. Confirm kena tipu emas palsu. Share kat semua group korang.
reason: Spreading false claims about Indian-owned gold shops being fraudulent, encouraging ethnic-based boycott through misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada masalah dengan kedai emas, laporkan kepada KPDNHEP. Jangan sebarkan dakwaan palsu berdasarkan kaum pemilik kedai.

input_text: Aku ada gambar budak sekolah tu tengah dating dengan cikgu dia. Dia belajar kat sekolah area Shah Alam. Sape nak gambar, PM.
reason: Distributing potentially exploitative images involving a student and sharing school location information, severe privacy violation involving a minor.
suggested_rewrite: Kes melibatkan pelajar dan guru perlu dilaporkan kepada pihak berkuasa. Menyebarkan gambar dan maklumat seperti ini adalah jenayah terutamanya jika melibatkan kanak-kanak.

input_text: Bila nak PRU, confirm la kaum Cina semua pangkah roket. Memang darah pembangkang. Tak ada satu pun yang sayang kerajaan Melayu.
reason: Sweeping false claim about Chinese voting patterns, framing democratic participation as racial disloyalty.
suggested_rewrite: Pengundi Malaysia dari semua kaum membuat pilihan berdasarkan pelbagai faktor. Adalah tidak tepat untuk menggeneralisasikan corak undian berdasarkan kaum.

input_text: Daging lembu tu suci untuk Hindu tapi kita potong depan kuil dorang. Biar dorang rasa macam mana kita rasa bila dorang hina agama kita.
reason: Deliberately proposing cow slaughter near Hindu temples as religious retaliation, provocative act designed to inflame inter-religious conflict.
suggested_rewrite: Menghormati kepercayaan agama lain adalah asas keharmonian Malaysia. Tindakan sengaja memprovokasi mana-mana agama boleh menyebabkan konflik yang serius.

input_text: Syed Saddiq tu sebenarnya keturunan Yahudi. Aku ada bukti. Orang Yahudi memang tak boleh dipercayai. Share biar rakyat tahu.
reason: Spreading false conspiracy theories about a public figure's ancestry combined with antisemitic tropes, designed to discredit through ethnic hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Kritikan terhadap ahli politik harus berdasarkan fakta dan prestasi mereka, bukan teori konspirasi tentang keturunan mereka.

input_text: Mak budak tu jual nasi lemak tepi jalan kat Setapak. Anak dia yang buli anak aku kat sekolah. Jom kita pergi kacau gerai dia sampai dia tutup.
reason: Doxxing a parent's business location and organizing sabotage as revenge for a school bullying incident, punishing a parent for a child's actions.
suggested_rewrite: Isu buli sekolah perlu ditangani melalui pihak sekolah dan ibu bapa secara baik. Mengganggu punca pendapatan seseorang adalah tindakan yang tidak adil.

input_text: Kerajaan kena stop bagi lesen gereja baru. Dah terlalu banyak. Malaysia negara Islam, bukan negara Kristian. Kalau tak suka, migrate la.
reason: Calling to restrict church construction based on religious supremacism and telling Christians to emigrate, denying constitutional freedom of worship.
suggested_rewrite: Perlembagaan Malaysia menjamin kebebasan beragama untuk semua rakyat. Rumah ibadat semua agama tertakluk kepada peraturan perancangan yang sama.

input_text: Orang Asli Temiar tu bodoh sangat. Kena tipu dengan pembalak pun tak sedar. Patut la tanah dorang kena rampas, takkan nak protect.
reason: Victim-blaming Orang Asli communities for land theft and calling them stupid, adding insult to systemic exploitation.
suggested_rewrite: Masyarakat Orang Asli Temiar adalah mangsa pembalakan haram. Mereka memerlukan sokongan undang-undang untuk mempertahankan tanah adat mereka, bukan dipersalahkan.

input_text: Lepas ni semua orang kita wajib beli dari kedai Melayu je. Ekonomi kita kena dikuasai bangsa kita. Jangan bagi peluang kaum lain monopoli.
reason: Framing economic activity as ethnic competition and calling for exclusive ethnic patronage, promoting economic segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Menyokong perniagaan tempatan adalah baik, tetapi ia tidak perlu berdasarkan kaum. Ekonomi Malaysia berkembang melalui kerjasama semua rakyat.

input_text: These Chinese schools are breeding grounds for anti-national sentiment. They don't even teach proper BM. Close them all down.
reason: Calls for shutting down vernacular schools using inflammatory language and false claims about breeding anti-national sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: Vernacular schools are constitutionally protected in Malaysia. Discussions about education policy should focus on constructive improvements rather than targeting any community's educational institutions.

input_text: I found out where that influencer lives. She stays at Setia Alam, near the Tesco area. Let's go teach her a lesson for what she said about our community.
reason: Sharing residential area of a named person and calling for physical confrontation. Doxxing-lite combined with threat of violence.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with what someone said, respond through proper channels or constructive dialogue. Sharing personal location information is dangerous and wrong.

input_text: All the Malay votes go to one party anyway. They're just sheep following their leaders. No point debating with them about politics.
reason: Dehumanizing an ethnic group as 'sheep' and dismissing their political agency with false generalizations about voting behavior.
suggested_rewrite: Voting patterns are influenced by many factors including local issues and candidate quality. Every voter makes their own informed decision regardless of ethnicity.

input_text: Don't eat at that mamak stall. The Indian owner doesn't wash his hands. Typical la these people. So dirty.
reason: Racial stereotype associating Indian food vendors with uncleanliness. Combines business targeting with ethnic slur.
suggested_rewrite: If you have hygiene concerns about a food establishment, report it to the health department rather than making generalisations about any ethnic group.

input_text: I know that girl's IC number and her parents' phone number. If she doesn't take down her post, I'll share everything online.
reason: Threatening to release personal identity information (IC number, family contacts) as blackmail to silence someone online.
suggested_rewrite: Threatening to expose someone's private information is a criminal offence under Malaysian law. If you have a grievance, use proper legal channels.

input_text: These Orang Asli people should be grateful we give them anything at all. They contribute nothing to the economy. Just living off government handouts.
reason: Demeaning Orang Asli communities by denying their contributions and framing government support as charity rather than their constitutional right.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli communities are the indigenous peoples of Peninsular Malaysia with constitutional rights to land and development support. Their cultural knowledge and contributions are valuable.

input_text: Let's organize a boycott of all Muslim-owned restaurants during Ramadan. They shouldn't force us to eat behind curtains in our own country.
reason: Calling for ethnic/religious boycott of businesses and misrepresenting Ramadan courtesy practices as oppression.
suggested_rewrite: During Ramadan, some restaurants adjust their operations out of respect. This is a cultural practice, not a restriction on others. Mutual understanding builds a stronger community.

input_text: That journalist who exposed the corruption scandal — someone needs to dig up her past. I bet she has skeletons. Let's ruin her credibility.
reason: Coordinated campaign to discredit a journalist through personal attacks rather than addressing the substance of their reporting.
suggested_rewrite: Journalists play a vital role in holding power accountable. Criticisms should address the facts of their reporting, not target them personally.

input_text: The election results prove that non-Bumiputera voters are trying to take over the country. We need to protect our rights before it's too late.
reason: False narrative framing democratic participation by non-Bumiputera citizens as a hostile takeover, stoking fear and communal tension.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysian citizens have the right to vote. Election results reflect the democratic will of the people, not an ethnic power grab.

input_text: Have you seen that Hindu temple near my housing area? The noise, the pollution, the traffic. These people have no consideration. Should be relocated far away.
reason: Targets a religious community's place of worship with 'NIMBY' rhetoric, framing Hindu religious activities as a nuisance and calling for displacement.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about noise or traffic near any place of worship can be discussed constructively with the relevant authorities and community leaders.

input_text: Muslims in Malaysia think they own the country. Newsflash: this was a Hindu-Buddhist land before Islam came. They're the real pendatang.
reason: Weaponizing historical narratives to delegitimize Malay-Muslim identity and applying 'pendatang' rhetoric in reverse, equally divisive and inflammatory.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia has a rich multi-layered history. All communities have deep roots here and are equal citizens under the Constitution.

input_text: Look at this Grab driver's profile. His name is Ahmad, works the Subang route every night. Ladies beware, he was rude to my friend. Spread this.
reason: Doxxing a gig worker with name and route information based on an unverified complaint, encouraging targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: If you had a bad experience with a ride-sharing driver, report it through the app's official complaint system. Don't share personal details publicly.

input_text: Indian temples keep encroaching on public land. Time we take back what's ours. Who's with me to protest at the site this weekend?
reason: Framing religious sites as encroachment and organizing community action against a specific religious group's place of worship.
suggested_rewrite: Land use disputes should be resolved through proper legal and administrative channels. Organizing protests against places of worship can escalate into communal conflict.

input_text: Why are we giving scholarships to these pendatang children? Malaysian money should go to Bumiputera students only. Share this if you agree.
reason: Uses 'pendatang' slur against Malaysian-born citizens and calls for educational discrimination based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Education policy should aim to provide opportunities for all Malaysian students based on merit and need, regardless of background.

input_text: Every time a Chinese business opens in our area, property prices go up and locals get pushed out. We need to stop them from expanding here.
reason: Scapegoating Chinese business owners for economic pressures and calling for exclusionary action against their business activities.
suggested_rewrite: Property price increases are driven by many market factors. Blaming any single ethnic group oversimplifies a complex economic issue.

input_text: Someone needs to compile a list of all the Malay businesses that supported the opposition. We'll make sure they lose customers. Economic war.
reason: Organizing economic retaliation against businesses based on the owner's ethnicity and political stance. Combines ethnic targeting with vindictive action.
suggested_rewrite: In a democracy, people are free to support any political party. Punishing businesses for their owners' political views undermines democratic principles.

input_text: My neighbor is a Sikh, and he always wears that turban. Looks like a terrorist honestly. Someone should report him to the police just in case.
reason: Associating Sikh religious attire with terrorism and calling for baseless police reports. Religious profiling and harassment.
suggested_rewrite: The turban is a sacred article of Sikh faith and has nothing to do with terrorism. Malaysia is a multi-religious country where religious expression should be respected.

input_text: These Christian missionaries are secretly converting Malay children. We need to expose their churches and stop them. I have addresses of three locations.
reason: Spreading unverified conspiracy theories about religious conversion, threatening to doxx church locations, and inciting communal action.
suggested_rewrite: Religious conversion concerns should be reported to JAIS or relevant religious authorities. Spreading unverified claims and threatening places of worship is dangerous.

input_text: The DAP is a Chinese chauvinist party. Any Malay who votes DAP is a traitor to their race. Mark my words, we'll remember who betrayed us.
reason: Labels a political party with ethnic slurs, brands inter-ethnic political cooperation as racial betrayal, and implies retribution.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysian political parties serve diverse constituencies. Voters choose parties based on policies and governance, and this should be respected regardless of ethnicity.

input_text: That Malay girl who married a non-Muslim — her family should disown her. Someone share her family's contact so we can tell them their daughter is a disgrace.
reason: Attempting to doxx family members over an interfaith marriage decision. Combines privacy violation with religious shaming and family harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Personal relationship decisions are private matters. Attempting to involve or harass someone's family over their choices is a violation of privacy and dignity.

input_text: Let's all go to that activist's Facebook and flood her comments with hate. She thinks she can criticize our religion and get away with it? Teach her a lesson.
reason: Organizing coordinated cyberbullying against an activist for expressing views on religion, with implicit threats.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with someone's views on religion, engage in respectful dialogue. Coordinated online harassment is cyberbullying and may be illegal.

input_text: I saw that politician eating bak kut teh even though he's supposed to be Muslim. Got photo evidence. Going to post on all socials to destroy his career.
reason: Surveilling someone's private dining choices and threatening to weaponize religious expectations to destroy their career. Privacy violation with religious shaming.
suggested_rewrite: A person's dietary choices are private matters. Using such information to damage someone's reputation is an invasion of privacy.

input_text: Orang Asli people are so backward. They worship trees and rocks. They need to convert to a real religion if they want to progress.
reason: Denigrating Orang Asli spiritual practices and pressuring conversion, combining religious bigotry with discrimination against indigenous communities.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli communities have rich spiritual traditions that are part of Malaysia's cultural heritage. Freedom of religion is a constitutional right for all Malaysians.

input_text: All the illegal immigrants in Sabah are Muslim. That's why crime is so high there. Connect the dots people.
reason: Falsely linking a specific religion to crime and illegal immigration, creating a dangerous stereotype that could incite violence.
suggested_rewrite: Immigration and crime are complex issues with many contributing factors. Attributing them to any single religious group is inaccurate and harmful.

input_text: That teacher who punished my son — I've found out her full schedule and which route she drives home. She better watch herself.
reason: Stalking behavior revealed through knowledge of someone's daily schedule and commute route, with implied physical threat.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about a teacher's conduct should be raised through the school administration or education department, not through intimidation.

input_text: 华人不要再去马来人的店买东西了。他们赚了我们的钱还要骂我们pendatang。全面抵制！
reason: Calls for Chinese Malaysians to boycott all Malay-owned businesses, framing economic activity along ethnic lines and escalating tensions.
suggested_rewrite: 作为消费者，我们可以根据服务质量选择商家，而不是基于店主的种族。种族和谐需要大家共同维护。

input_text: 马来人就是懒惰，只会靠政府补贴过日子。没有我们华人，这个国家的经济早就完了。
reason: Racist stereotyping of Malays as lazy and claiming Chinese economic superiority, demeaning an entire community while promoting ethnic chauvinism.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚的经济成就是所有族群共同努力的结果。每个社区都为国家发展做出了重要贡献。

input_text: 那个印度庙每天早上五点就开始敲鼓念经，吵死了。这些人的宗教就是噪音污染，应该搬到郊外去。
reason: Reducing Hindu religious practices to 'noise pollution' and calling for displacement of temples, targeting a religious community.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对宗教场所的声音有顾虑，可以通过地方政府与庙方协调解决，而不是贬低整个宗教。

input_text: 大选结果证明马来人全部投种族主义政党。他们根本不想和其他种族和平共处。这个国家没希望了。
reason: Misleading generalization about Malay voting patterns, labeling all Malay-supported parties as racist and promoting communal despair.
suggested_rewrite: 选举结果反映了多种因素的综合影响。将整个族群的投票行为简单标签化是不准确的，马来西亚的多元共处仍有许多积极的方面。

input_text: 穆斯林斋戒月期间强迫我们不能在公共场合吃东西，这是什么道理？他们的宗教凭什么管到我们头上？
reason: Misrepresenting Ramadan courtesy practices as religious oppression, deliberately inflaming anti-Muslim sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: 斋戒月期间的用餐安排是出于互相尊重的文化礼仪。非穆斯林并非被禁止用餐，只是部分场所会做调整。相互理解有助于促进社会和谐。

input_text: 我认识那个在网上骂华人的马来网红。他住在蕉赖那边，开一辆银色Myvi。大家去找他算账。
reason: Sharing location and vehicle details of a person and calling for physical confrontation, combining doxxing with vigilante threats.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有人在网上发表种族仇恨言论，应该向MCMC或警方举报，而不是自行寻找对方进行报复。

input_text: 把那些原住民的土地收回来开发不就好了？他们反正也不会用，就知道打猎采果子，浪费资源。
reason: Advocating seizure of Orang Asli ancestral lands and dismissing their traditional way of life as wasteful.
suggested_rewrite: 原住民拥有宪法保障的土地权利。他们的传统生活方式是马来西亚文化遗产的重要组成部分，应该得到尊重和保护。

input_text: 听说那个华小老师私下跟学生家长有不正当关系。我朋友有证据，快帮忙转发让学校知道。她在某某花园的学校教书。
reason: Spreading unverified personal allegations about a teacher with identifying workplace information, encouraging viral shaming.
suggested_rewrite: 未经证实的指控不应该在网上传播。如果有确凿的证据，应该向学校管理层或教育局正式举报。

input_text: 那些信印度教的在Thaipusam扎针穿身体，太恶心了。这种野蛮的宗教仪式应该被禁止。
reason: Describing Thaipusam kavadi rituals as 'disgusting' and 'barbaric', calling for banning a protected religious practice.
suggested_rewrite: Thaipusam的kavadi仪式是印度教重要的宗教传统，参与者自愿进行。尊重不同宗教的习俗是多元社会的基本素养。

input_text: 华人拿了公民权还不满足，现在连马来保留地都要抢。这些pendatang真的贪得无厌。
reason: Applying 'pendatang' rhetoric to Chinese Malaysian citizens, accusing them of greed, and framing constitutional rights as theft.
suggested_rewrite: 土地政策是复杂的法律和经济议题。所有马来西亚公民都有宪法保障的权利，不应被称为'外来者'。

input_text: 我知道那个blogger住在哪里。PJ那边的公寓。再敢写文章骂我们，我就把她的地址公布出来。
reason: Threatening to doxx a blogger's residential address as retaliation for their writing, combining intimidation with privacy threats.
suggested_rewrite: 言论自由受法律保护。如果认为某人的文章违法，应通过法律途径解决，而不是威胁公开他人住址。

input_text: 选举的时候印度人全部跟着一个政党投票，跟绵羊一样没脑子。他们的票根本没意义。
reason: Dehumanizing Indian voters as 'sheep' and dismissing their democratic participation with false generalizations about voting behavior.
suggested_rewrite: 每个选民都有自己的投票考量。将整个族群的投票行为简单化是不尊重民主过程的表现。

input_text: 那个卖猪肉的摊位就在清真餐厅隔壁，故意的吧？我们应该去把他赶走，穆斯林不能接受这种事。
reason: Calling for forced removal of a legal business based on religious dietary sensitivities, inciting vigilante action.
suggested_rewrite: 商铺位置的安排是市政规划的范畴。如果有顾虑，可以向地方政府提出建议，而不是自行驱赶合法经营的商户。

input_text: 我们学校的马来老师偏心马来学生，华人学生被歧视。所有华人家长一起去学校闹，让那个老师滚蛋。
reason: Framing a school issue in ethnic terms and calling for mob action to remove a teacher, escalating a complaint into communal confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对教学公平性有顾虑，家长可以通过家教协会或教育局的正式渠道提出投诉，理性地寻求解决方案。

input_text: 华人朋友们注意了，那些马来保安平时偷看我们家的情况。他们可能在暗中记录我们的行踪。要小心这些人。
reason: Spreading baseless conspiracy theory about Malay security guards spying on Chinese residents, fostering ethnic paranoia and distrust.
suggested_rewrite: 保安人员的职责是维护社区安全。如果对保安服务有疑虑，可以向管理层反映，而不是基于种族进行猜测。

input_text: இந்த மலாய் அரசாங்கம் தமிழர்களை எப்போதும் ஒதுக்கி வைக்கிறது. நாம் ஒன்றாக சேர்ந்து அவர்களின் கடைகளை புறக்கணிக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Calls for ethnic boycott of Malay businesses as retaliation for perceived government discrimination. Escalates political grievance into communal economic warfare.
suggested_rewrite: அரசாங்க கொள்கைகள் குறித்த அதிருப்தியை சரியான அரசியல் மற்றும் சட்ட வழிகளில் தெரிவிக்கலாம். வணிகங்களை இன அடிப்படையில் புறக்கணிப்பது சமூக நல்லிணக்கத்தை பாதிக்கும்.

input_text: முஸ்லிம்கள் ஹலால் உணவு மட்டுமே சாப்பிட வேண்டும் என்று சொல்கிறார்கள். ஆனால் அவர்கள் எங்கள் கோவில் பிரசாதத்தை அசுத்தம் என்கிறார்கள். இது அவமானம்!
reason: Misrepresenting halal dietary practices as an insult to Hindu temple prasadam, deliberately inflaming inter-religious tensions.
suggested_rewrite: உணவு விதிகள் ஒவ்வொரு மதத்திலும் உள்ளன. ஒருவர் மற்றவரின் உணவு பழக்கங்களை மதிக்க வேண்டும். வெவ்வேறு மத நடைமுறைகளை ஒப்பிட்டு அவமானப்படுத்துவது தவறு.

input_text: அந்த மலாய் பையன் என் மகளை தொந்தரவு செய்கிறான். அவன் எங்கே வேலை செய்கிறான் என்று தெரியும். நண்பர்களே, போய் பாடம் கற்பிப்போம்.
reason: Sharing workplace information and calling for friends to confront someone physically. Vigilante justice with doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: தொந்தரவு சம்பவங்களை காவல்துறையில் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். சுய நீதி வழங்குவது சட்டவிரோதம் மற்றும் ஆபத்தானது.

input_text: தேர்தலில் சீனர்கள் எல்லோரும் DAP-க்கு வாக்களிக்கிறார்கள். அவர்கள் மலேசியாவை கைப்பற்ற நினைக்கிறார்கள். விழிப்புடன் இருங்கள்!
reason: False claim about monolithic Chinese voting and conspiracy theory about ethnic takeover, designed to create fear and division.
suggested_rewrite: வாக்களிப்பு முறைகள் பல காரணிகளால் தீர்மானிக்கப்படுகின்றன. ஒரு குறிப்பிட்ட இனத்தை நாட்டைக் கைப்பற்ற முயல்வதாக சித்தரிப்பது தவறானது.

input_text: பழங்குடி மக்கள் இன்னும் காட்டுமிராண்டிகளாக வாழ்கிறார்கள். அவர்களுக்கு நிலம் கொடுப்பது வீண். நவீன சமூகத்திற்கு அவர்கள் பொருத்தமானவர்கள் அல்ல.
reason: Calling Orang Asli 'savages' and unfit for modern society. Dehumanizing language denying their land rights and human dignity.
suggested_rewrite: பழங்குடி மக்கள் மலேசியாவின் பூர்வீக மக்கள். அவர்களின் நில உரிமைகள் அரசியலமைப்பால் பாதுகாக்கப்படுகின்றன. அவர்களின் கலாச்சாரம் மற்றும் வாழ்க்கை முறையை மதிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: மலாய் கடைகளில் வாங்காதீர்கள். அவர்கள் நம் பணத்தை எடுத்துக்கொண்டு நம்மை pendatang என்று அழைக்கிறார்கள். தமிழர்கள் எழுங்கள்!
reason: Calling for ethnic boycott and using inflammatory rally language to mobilize Tamil community against Malay businesses.
suggested_rewrite: 'Pendatang' என்ற சொல் பயன்பாடு தவறானது என்பதை சட்ட வழிகளில் எதிர்க்கலாம். வணிக புறக்கணிப்பு சமூக நல்லிணக்கத்தை மேலும் பாதிக்கும்.

input_text: அந்த இஸ்லாமிய பள்ளிவாசல் ஒலிபெருக்கி ரொம்ப சத்தமாக இருக்கிறது. இந்த மதத்தினர் மற்றவர்களை மதிப்பதில்லை. அவர்களின் மதம் சகிப்புத்தன்மையற்றது.
reason: Escalating a noise complaint into a wholesale condemnation of Islam as 'intolerant', generalizing from one mosque to the entire religion.
suggested_rewrite: ஒலிபெருக்கி ஒலி அளவு குறித்த கவலைகளை உள்ளாட்சி அமைப்புகளிடம் மரியாதையாக தெரிவிக்கலாம். ஒரு மதத்தை முழுமையாக குற்றம்சாட்டுவது நியாயமற்றது.

input_text: அந்த கிறிஸ்தவ மிஷனரிகள் தமிழ் இந்துக்களை மதம் மாற்றுகிறார்கள். அவர்களின் தேவாலயங்களை மூட வேண்டும். முகவரிகளை பகிரலாம்.
reason: Spreading anti-Christian conspiracy about forced conversion and threatening to share church addresses for potential harassment.
suggested_rewrite: மதமாற்றம் குறித்த கவலைகள் இருந்தால் சம்பந்தப்பட்ட மத அமைப்புகளிடம் அல்லது அதிகாரிகளிடம் முறையிடலாம். வழிபாட்டுத் தலங்களை மிரட்டுவது தவறு.

input_text: என் அக்கம்பக்கத்து சீனக்காரர்கள் பன்றி இறைச்சி சமைக்கிறார்கள். வாசனை எங்கள் வீட்டிற்கு வருகிறது. இந்த அசுத்தமான உணவை சமைப்பவர்களை இங்கிருந்து விரட்ட வேண்டும்.
reason: Labeling pork as 'impure' and calling for expulsion of Chinese neighbors over their dietary practices, combining religious provocation with communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: அண்டை வீட்டார் சமையல் வாசனை குறித்த பிரச்சனைகளை நேரடியாகவோ உள்ளாட்சி மூலமாகவோ பேசி தீர்க்கலாம். மற்றவர்களின் உணவு பழக்கங்களை அவமானப்படுத்துவது தவறு.

input_text: இன்னொரு தமிழ் பெண் ஒரு மலாய் பையனை கல்யாணம் பண்ணிருக்கா. இவளுக்கு வெட்கமே இல்ல. அவ வேலை செய்யுற இடத்தை share பண்ணுங்க, நாங்க போய் பேசுறோம்.
reason: Shaming a woman for interfaith marriage, seeking workplace info for confrontation. Combines doxxing attempt with religious and cultural harassment.
suggested_rewrite: திருமண முடிவுகள் தனிப்பட்ட விஷயங்கள். ஒருவரின் பணியிடத்தை பகிர்ந்து அவர்களை மிரட்டுவது சட்டவிரோதமானது.

input_text: Bro aku dah screenshot semua conversation dia. Nanti kita blast kat semua group WhatsApp. Let her reputation hancur. She deserves it for what she did.
reason: Planning to leak private conversations across multiple platforms to destroy someone's reputation. Coordinated privacy violation and cyberbullying.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan perbualan peribadi tanpa kebenaran adalah pencerobohan privasi. If you have a dispute, resolve it through proper channels instead of public shaming.

input_text: These orang kampung Orang Asli ah, masuk bandar pun tak reti behave. Kat mall pun macam still in the jungle. So embarrassing la.
reason: Mocking Orang Asli communities as uncivilized in urban settings, using dehumanizing 'jungle' comparison.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang berhak berada di ruang awam. Mengejek komuniti Orang Asli berdasarkan stereotaip adalah tidak adil dan menyakitkan.

input_text: Eh korang tau tak, semua undi dari kawasan majority Chinese confirm masuk opposition one. They'll never support a Malay PM. That's the reality.
reason: False generalization about Chinese Malaysian voting patterns and claim they would never support a Malay leader, promoting ethnic distrust.
suggested_rewrite: Corak pengundian dipengaruhi banyak faktor. Many Chinese Malaysians have supported various parties across the political spectrum. Generalizations like this are inaccurate.

input_text: 那个Malay ustaz cakap non-Muslim tak patut celebrate Christmas di Malaysia。我 support dia。This is an Islamic country after all, right?
reason: Endorsing a preacher's exclusionary stance against Christmas celebrations, misrepresenting Malaysia's constitutional framework as exclusively Islamic.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia menjamin kebebasan beragama dalam Perlembagaan. All Malaysians are free to celebrate their religious festivals. Mutual respect is key to our harmony.

input_text: Aku nak expose maklumat dia. I already found her LinkedIn, Instagram, even her parents' address in Klang. Siapa nak tolong share, DM me.
reason: Attempting comprehensive doxxing including social media profiles and family address, soliciting help to distribute the information.
suggested_rewrite: Mengumpul dan menyebarkan maklumat peribadi seseorang adalah jenayah di bawah undang-undang Malaysia. If you have a complaint, use legal channels.

input_text: Dey, don't go to that Indian barber shop la. Confirm kena caj lebih one. You know la how these people are — always try to cheat.
reason: Racist stereotype branding Indian business owners as cheats, discouraging patronage based on ethnicity rather than actual experience.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau rasa harga tak berpatutan, boleh pergi kedai lain. Jangan salahkan seluruh kaum atas pengalaman satu individu.

input_text: Weh that Malay girl yang convert keluar Islam tu, aku dah jumpa dia kerja kat Midvalley. Someone should go confront her. Murtad tak boleh dibiarkan.
reason: Doxxing someone's workplace over their private religious decisions and inciting confrontation. Combines privacy violation with religious persecution.
suggested_rewrite: Isu keagamaan peribadi adalah urusan individu dan pihak berkuasa agama. Mengenal pasti dan menghadapi seseorang di tempat kerja adalah gangguan dan mungkin jenayah.

input_text: Boycott semua Chinese restaurants this month. They don't hire Malay workers and they look down on us. Hit them where it hurts — their wallet.
reason: Calling for ethnic boycott of Chinese-owned restaurants with unverified discrimination claims, explicitly seeking economic harm along racial lines.
suggested_rewrite: Isu diskriminasi pekerjaan boleh dilaporkan kepada JTK. Boikot berdasarkan kaum hanya memburukkan hubungan antara masyarakat.

input_text: Haiya ini Melayu semua nak cuti public holiday je tau. Raya cuti, Maulud cuti, Nuzul Quran cuti. Pantas la negara tak maju. So many holidays for one religion.
reason: Mocking Islamic public holidays and stereotyping Malays as lazy, blaming religious observances for national underperformance.
suggested_rewrite: Public holidays in Malaysia reflect its multicultural character including celebrations from various religions. Productivity is not determined by the number of holidays.

input_text: Aku dah record video dia mabuk kat club semalam. Padahal dia pakai tudung. Hypocrite betul. I'm going to post this everywhere unless she apologizes to me.
reason: Recording someone without consent and using it as blackmail, weaponizing religious expectations to shame and coerce.
suggested_rewrite: Merakam dan mengugut untuk menyebarkan video peribadi seseorang adalah pencerobohan privasi dan mungkin jenayah pemerasan.

input_text: Semua Myanmar refugees kat area Ampang tu must be kicked out. They're stealing our jobs, committing crimes. Someone should organize a protest at their housing area.
reason: Xenophobic scapegoating of refugees with false generalizations about crime and job theft, calling for organized action against their housing.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pelarian perlu ditangani melalui dasar kerajaan dan badan antarabangsa. Membuat generalisasi dan menganjurkan tindakan terhadap komuniti mereka adalah berbahaya.

input_text: Bukan racist tau, tapi memang la orang India ni bau. Pergi gym pun dah boleh bau. It's just a fact, not my fault.
reason: Using 'not racist but' framing to deliver a racist body-odor stereotype about Indian Malaysians, dehumanizing an entire community.
suggested_rewrite: Stereotaip berdasarkan kaum adalah tidak adil dan tidak tepat. Personal hygiene is an individual matter, not a racial characteristic.

input_text: Jom kita mass report that activist's social media sampai kena suspend. Dia dah banyak kali cakap benda yang hina Islam. We need to silence her.
reason: Coordinated cyberbullying to silence someone through mass false reporting, explicitly aiming to remove their platform.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kandungan yang menyinggung agama, report secara individu. Coordinated mass reporting to silence someone is a form of cyberbullying.

input_text: Semua Cina kat Malaysia ni ungrateful. Bagi citizenship pun still nak demand equal rights. Pendatang should know their place la.
reason: Double application of 'pendatang' slur and denial of equal rights for Chinese Malaysians, telling citizens born in Malaysia to 'know their place'.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia mempunyai hak yang dijamin Perlembagaan. Calling fellow citizens 'pendatang' is divisive and inaccurate regardless of their ethnicity.

input_text: That blogger kena hentam teruk online sampai dia delete semua social media. Good. Anyone else who dares to speak against our race will get the same treatment.
reason: Celebrating successful cyberbullying campaign that silenced someone and threatening others with the same treatment. Chilling effect on free speech.
suggested_rewrite: Memaksa seseorang menutup media sosial melalui serangan bertubi-tubi adalah buli siber. Freedom of expression should be protected, not silenced through intimidation.
